overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through an ancient Mediterranean harbor district at dawn. The character navigates cobblestone streets lined with classical stone architecture and construction equipment, passing through colonnaded walkways before reaching the waterfront with ancient trireme ships docked at the harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor construction street with materials and cranes

events.description: character turns left to follow the curved street path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the harbor street, passing NPCs and construction materials while approaching the distant crane structures

notable_agents.action: woman in green tunic standing near building entrance
man in tunic walking toward the character

entered.detail: multi-story stone building with tall Corinthian columns and decorative facade
large timber crane structure used for loading ships
piles of wooden beams, ropes, and building supplies stacked along the street
large red-brown ceramic storage jars positioned near the building
stone structure with arches spanning the background of the harbor area

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cobblestone street lined with classical stone buildings and construction materials. The character passes pedestrians including a woman in green near a building entrance, while wooden cranes and red banners are visible in the distance against the dawn sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway with classical pillars

events.description: enters covered colonnade with large fluted stone pillars and hanging red banners

agents.ego_description: walking through the colonnaded passage between tall stone pillars with red banners overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead into the colonnade

entered.detail: tall fluted stone columns supporting the roof structure of the walkway
crimson fabric banners suspended between the stone columns
wooden wagon loaded with hay bales parked along the wall
wooden stands holding round shields and spears

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered colonnade with tall fluted pillars and red hanging banners. The space is partially sheltered with stone architecture dominating the view, wooden carts parked along the sides, and weapon racks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with pottery storage approaching waterfront

events.description: exits colonnade into open courtyard with stacked pottery and construction materials
reaches waterfront with ancient trireme ships and harbor water becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through open courtyard filled with pottery jars and scaffolding, approaching the harbor edge

entered.detail: wooden shelving units holding multiple terracotta amphorae
temporary wooden construction structure against the stone wall
large wooden warship with ram prow and furled sails docked at harbor
calm water of the harbor reflecting the dawn sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an open courtyard filled with racks of pottery amphorae and construction scaffolding. The harbor comes into view with an ancient trireme ship docked at the waterfront, revealing the open water and distant city skyline beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor dock with trireme ships and wooden cranes

events.description: character turns to face the harbor water and ancient ships
turns back and continues walking along the stone dock

agents.ego_description: pausing at the waterfront to observe the ancient ships and harbor view, then continuing along the dock

entered.detail: paved stone boundary along the waterfront
wide stone steps leading down toward the water level
buildings and structures visible across the harbor water

segments.scene_description: Standing at the stone dock edge overlooking the calm harbor water with ancient trireme ships moored alongside. The character surveys the waterfront with its wooden cranes and stone stairs before turning and continuing along the dock area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, bustling city street into the open expanse of an ancient Mediterranean harbor at dawn. It begins by navigating a cobblestone road lined with classical stone buildings and construction materials, passing pedestrians and distant red banners under a pale morning sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a sheltered colonnade of tall fluted pillars and parked wooden carts before emerging into a wide courtyard filled with pottery amphorae and scaffolding. This opening reveals the waterfront, where the view expands to show a docked trireme ship and the distant city skyline across the water. Finally, the camera reaches the stone dock's edge, surveying the calm harbor and its wooden cranes before continuing along the waterfront.
